Cuisines.title: Cuisines
Cuisines.metaDescription: Travel the world through food — Italian, Georgian, Japanese, Mexican and more.
Cuisines.subtitle: A taste of every corner of the world.
Cuisines.recipeCount: {count, plural, =0 {No recipes} one {# recipe} other {# recipes}}

intros.italian: Generous, rustic and built on great ingredients — pasta, pizza and the comfort of a shared table.
intros.french: Elegant technique meets everyday comfort, from silky soups to buttery pastries.
intros.georgian: Bold, herby and hospitable — cheese-filled breads and walnut-rich classics.
intros.japanese: Clean, precise and deeply savory, balancing umami, texture and season.
intros.mexican: Vibrant, spiced and full of life, layering chillies, lime and fresh herbs.
intros.indian: Aromatic and warming, a masterclass in spice, lentils and slow-built flavor.
intros.mediterranean: Sun-soaked and wholesome — olive oil, legumes, vegetables and fresh herbs.
intros.ukrainian: Hearty and homey, rooted in beets, grains and generous comfort food.
intros.latvian: Earthy and northern, celebrating rye, berries and honest baking.
intros.american: Comforting and crowd-pleasing, from diner classics to weekend bakes.

About.title: About Savora
About.metaDescription: About the Savora project — our cooking philosophy, data and image sources.
About.introBody: Savora is a demo bilingual recipe website built to showcase modern, accessible and fully internationalized web development. Every recipe is written by hand in both English and Russian.
About.philosophyBody: We believe good food is generous, seasonal and unfussy. The recipes here favor real ingredients, clear steps and dishes you'll actually want to cook again.
About.dataBody: All recipe content is original demo data stored locally in the app. Nutrition values are approximate and provided for illustration only.
About.imageBody: Photographs are loaded from open and permissively licensed sources such as Unsplash, Pexels and Wikimedia Commons. All rights remain with their respective photographers.
About.a11yBody: The site is built mobile-first with semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, visible focus states, strong color contrast and full support for reduced-motion preferences.

Footer.tagline: Cook smarter, eat better, explore more.
Footer.madeWith: Made with care for food lovers everywhere.
Footer.attribution: Photos via Unsplash, Pexels & Wikimedia Commons.
